narrative:
Rushcreek A (precinct in Fairfield County) has 703 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.5 percentage points.
